name: Brandied Krok-a-Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cheddar and cream cheese in a 2 quart glass microwave dish.
2. Microwave at 50% power for 3 to 5 minutes, stirring every minute until softened.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients.
4. Beat with an electric mixer until soft and creamy.
5. Pack into a crock or bowl with a tight-fitting lid.
6. Refrigerate for at least one week.
7. Serve at room temperature as a spread or dip.
This recipe has a wonderful flavor, stays nice and creamy, and keeps well. It's perfect for parties or enjoying on crackers, fresh vegetables, or breadsticks. Your friends will be amazed by the delicious taste!
